data.title: Kazakhstan to Legalize Cryptocurrency Exchange with New Regulations
data.description:

data.title: Arthur Hayes Warning About USDC & Wall Street’s Stablecoin Focus
data.description:
Arthur Hayes, co-founder of BitMEX, publicly warned that bank-backed stablecoins would “outcompete” Circle’s USDC. On May 23, 2025, he posted on X (formerly Twitter), “Bye bye Circle. Thanks for playing,” in response to media reports of Wall Street’s biggest banks planning a joint stablecoin
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/23/arthur-hayes-warning-about-usdc-wall-streets-stablecoin-focus/

data.title: JPMorgan Chase, TD Bank Issue Data Breach Alerts After Rogue Workers Steal Sensitive Info, Triggering Fraudulent Transactions for Several Customers
data.description:
Rogue employees at JPMorgan Chase and TD Bank have exposed customers to fraud by accessing and sharing privileged information. In a new filing with the state government of Massachusetts, Chase says an employee accessed its systems “without business justification” on November 5th of 2024.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/jpmorgan-chase-td-bank-issue-data-breach-alerts-after-rogue-workers-steal-sensitive-data-triggering-fraudulent-transactions-for-several-customers/

data.title: Global Portfolio Rebalancing May Lead to Dollar Sell-Off
data.description: According to Odaily, Barclays strategists have indicated that the recent easing of trade tensions, which has led to a rise in stock markets, may prompt global investors to rebalance their portfolios, potentially resulting in further dollar sell-offs. Barclays' model forecasts suggest that by the end of the month, the dollar may experience a moderate sell-off against major currencies, driven by the rise in U.S. stocks, despite the underperformance of U.S. bonds and the dollar.

data.title: Trump: 25% tariff on cellphone makers not manufacturing in the U.S.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump said that a 25% tariff will be imposed on mobile phone manufacturers that do not produce in the United States. Trump warned that if Samsung products are not made in the United States, a 25% tariff will be imposed. If Apple and Samsung build factories in the United States, they will be exempt from tariffs. If they are sold in the United States, they need to be manufactured in the United States. Trump said that tariffs will be imposed on Apple and Samsung by the end of June.

data.title: Most Trump Memecoin Dinner Attendees Have Moved or Sold Their TRUMP Coins
data.description: On-chain data shows that most of the big TRUMP Meme coin holders who were invited to attend President Trump’s crypto dinner had transferred their holdings to centralized exchanges before the dinner, with the average holdings falling from $4.78 million at the time of the snapshot to $2.11 million.

data.title: WalletConnect Token Expands to Solana and Will Airdrop 5 Million WCT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Following the launch of Ethereum and Optimism's OP mainnet, WalletConnect's WCT token has been launched on Solana, and the WalletConnect Foundation will airdrop 5 million WCT to active Solana users through partners such as Phantom, Jupiter, Backpack and Solflare. Founder and director Pedro Gomes said that the 5 million tokens are part of the 185 million WCT airdrop reserved by the foundation last September. The foundation said this will be the second large-scale WCT airdrop after the 50 million tokens distributed to the WalletConnect community in the first quarter of November last year. Solana users' airdrop claims will be open this summer, and eligibility criteria, distribution schedules, and claim instructions will be announced in the coming weeks. WCT currently trades at around $0.60, and the airdrop is worth about $3 million at current value.

data.title: Barclays rebalancing model shows dollar selling expected in late May
data.description: Barclays strategists said a rebalancing of portfolios by global investors could lead to more dollar selling after trade tensions eased significantly this month, leading to a rally in stock markets. Barclays model forecasts show that the US dollar will see mild selling against major currency pairs before the end of this month, driven by rising US stocks despite the poor performance of US Treasuries and the US dollar.

data.title: Corporate Bitcoin purchases in 2025: 205,507, 3 times more than new supply
data.description: According to statistics from asset management company Bitwise, corporate Bitcoin purchases in 2025 have exceeded three times the new supply of Bitcoin. Companies have increased their holdings by 205,507 Bitcoins and the new supply of Bitcoin is 64,556. This only includes purchases disclosed by listed companies, not private companies.

data.title: David Sacks to attend Bitcoin 2025 conference, sharing the stage with Winklevoss brothers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official news of the Bitcoin Conference, David Sacks, the White House's director of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence, will attend the Bitcoin 2025 conference on May 27, and share his insights on Bitcoin and the crypto industry with the Winklevoss brothers, president and CEO of Gemini. The Bitcoin 2025 conference will be held from May 27 to 29 at the Venetian Conference Center in Las Vegas, USA.

Bloomberg estimates show that Microsoft is the largest driver of Nvidia’s revenue, followed by Meta, Amazon, and Google parent Alphabet, while Tesla is Nvidia’s […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/nvidias-rise-fueled-by-fellow-magnificient-seven-members

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Suggests Possible Changes to Bank Regulations This Summer
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has indicated that regulatory bodies might lift a longstanding rule affecting banks' U.S. Treasury trading this summer. Besant mentioned that actions regarding the Supplementary Leverage Ratio (SLR) regulation are imminent. He highlighted that the Federal Reserve, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC), and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) are actively addressing this issue. "I believe we might see results by summer," he stated. The current SLR rules require banks to hold corresponding capital when trading U.S. Treasuries. Besant noted that removing this regulation could potentially lower U.S. Treasury yields by several basis points.

data.title: US Treasury Secretary: Banking SLR rules expected to be lifted this summer
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said regulators may cancel a long-standing regulation that restricts banks' U.S. Treasury bond trading this summer. Bessant said that action on the supplementary leverage ratio (SLR) regulations is very close. He pointed out that the three major bank regulators, the Federal Reserve, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC), and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC), are working on this issue, "I think we may see results in the summer." The existing SLR rules require banks to retain corresponding capital when trading U.S. bonds. Bessant said that canceling the regulations may cause U.S. Treasury yields to fall by dozens of basis points.

data.title: Celestia Announces Integration of Hyperlane as Native Interoperability Solution
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Modular blockchain Celestia announced the integration of Hyperlane as its native interoperability solution. Native TIA will be extended to platforms such as Ethereum, Solana, Base, Arbitrum One, Eclipse, Abstract, etc., powered by Hyperlane.

data.title: SEC Clarifies PoS Regulations, Excludes Staking from Securities Laws
data.description:
SEC's Hester Peirce clarifies Proof of Stake regulations, excluding staking activities from securities laws, benefiting US institutions.
source: https://coincu.com/339350-sec-clarifies-pos-staking-regulations
